subject: Recordings, Transcripts, Minutes, Materials, Executive Session Releasable Records, and Financials
nextDeadlineDescription: District portal/link production expected following active records tracking
requestedItems: Open meeting recordings, transcripts/captions, and minutes (all meetings and subcommittees)
Meeting notices, agendas, packets, and exhibits
Executive session releasable portions and segregable records
ACFR/CAFR reports, auditor reports, management letters, CAPs, and interim financial records

timeline.title: Broad PRR Submitted
